ops.title: cc-guides pull-model architecture (v3.1) — plugin/guides pack + cc-guides.toml manifest in cc-skills, no default source, repo lock file, JSON kind, per-repo daily re-render; fleet.json/fan-out DELETED 2026-07-10; v1 .src path DELETED in v0.1.16 (lock-onl

ops.body:
Rebuilt 2026-07-10 (cc-guides v0.1.13, 21/21 fleet + cc-skills itself migrated, all green): fragments distribute like capt-hook packs, pull not push.

- **Pack**: cc-skills hosts `plugin/guides/{md,sh,json}/` (mirrors cc-notes' `plugin/hooks`), addressed via manifest `.claude/cc-guides.toml` (`guides = "plugin/guides"`, root fallback). Consumer spec `github:yasyf/cc-skills@main` — no path, resolver follows the manifest; explicit `//path` form still works for manifest-less repos. **No default source**: every v3 layout.toml declares `[sources.cc-skills]`; fragments-FIRST, `[sources.*]` last (ErrFragmentsNested footgun). A v1-only transition default remains in the binary until the v1 path is deleted (backlog task 2a1cec27).
- **Lock, not banners**: `.claude/fragments/cc-guides.lock` (schema/version/artifacts registry/sources with FULL 40-hex pins) carries all provenance. Artifacts get a version-free `GENERATED` marker (md/sh) or nothing (json, pristine — clobber-guarded via lock membership only). FULL render re-resolves + rebuilds/prunes the lock; PATH-SCOPED render freezes shared pins to the lock and errors on spec disagreement. Cache keys on full sha with prefix lookup for legacy sha12 pins. Code-only binary releases render byte-identical artifacts (lock-only diff → re-render skips commit; skip rule counts non-version/commit lock-diff lines with a pipefail-safe awk).
- **JSON kind**: strict parse, insertion-ordered deep merge (objects recursive, arrays union structural-dedupe never sorted, later-wins conflicts), stable encoding. `.claude/settings.json` = `cc-skills:settings-base` + `settings-{go,python,swift}` + local `settings-overrides` residue — LIVE fleet-wide 2026-07-10 (21/21 converged on base @622253c; residues mostly `{}`; base carries TY_* env, captain-hook marketplace/plugin, and the 9-event hook set — SessionEnd is `uvx capt-hook review run` async, SessionStart `run SessionStart --async` async). Union cannot REMOVE (removals = move the key out of base) and cannot REPLACE a hook entry (variant + canonical would double-fire — treat stale capt-hook variants as superseded, drop from residue). captain-hook is the one exception: fully-LOCAL settings fragment (dev repo, local hook launcher preserved).
- **Propagation**: `fleet.json` + `guides-fan-out.yml` deleted. Each repo's `guides.yml`: check job (`yasyf/cc-guides@action-v1`, lock-first, legacy-banner fallback for stragglers) + re-render (re-render.yml@action-v1, daily cron `17 9 * * *` + `repository_dispatch: [cc-guides-render]`). Ad-hoc fleet push: `gh repo list` dispatch loop (documented in cc-skills guides-lint.yml header; repos without a listener ignore it). cc-skills gates pack purity via `guides-lint.yml` and is itself a consumer (root AGENTS.md = local intro + `cc-skills:ccx`; self-import pins main at render time).
- Releases immutable, auto-tag `v0.1.<run#>` per main push ([[go-release-canonical-architecture]]); old pins verify forever (pinned tarballs immutable); `action-v1` advanced by hand. repo-bootstrap ≥0.41.0 scaffolds native layout dirs + settings-from-fragments (PINNED/LATEST → `install-binary-pinned`/`-latest`; diverged scripts use repo-LOCAL fragments — cc-context precedent: ensure_rg + migration shim). Zero `*.src.*` fleet-wide. Related: [[cc-guides-generated-claude-md]], [[plugin-cache-keys-on-version]].
